prestazioni: Engine: 6G72TT (DOHC 24V 3.0L V6 Twin-Turbo) with forged internals including JE 87mm forged pistons (9.0:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings. Paired with a Tomei 272°/11.5mm lift camshaft kit and HKS adjustable cam gears for optimized valve timing.

Turbocharger Upgrade: Twin Garrett GT2860-5 .82 A/R turbos with TiAL 44mm MV-R wastegates and TiAL Q 50mm blow-off valves. Custom 3.5" stainless steel turbo-back exhaust with Burns Stainless 4-2-1 merge collectors and Vibrant 1799 high-flow catalytic converters.

Fuel & Ignition: Full Aeromotive fuel system with dual A1000 fuel pumps, ID1000x injectors, and a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU. Ignition upgrade includes HKS Twin Power ignition coils, NGK Iridium IX spark plugs (BKR7EIX), and a Splitfire Racing coil wire set. Supporting mods include a GReddy intercooler kit with 2.5" piping and a Mishimoto aluminum radiator.
estetica: Body Kit: Veilside Fortune 03 widebody conversion with custom carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a Rocket Bunny V2 rear diffuser. Front bumper modified with a custom D-MAX splitter and canards from a 996 GT3 Cup car for aggressive aero balance.

Suspension: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with 30-way adjustable damping, Swift Springs (8K front/10K rear), and polyurethane bushings from Energy Suspension. Chassis reinforcement includes a Cusco front strut tower bar, rear subframe brace, and a full Cusco bolt-in roll cage (8-point, mild steel).

Wheels & Aero: Work Emotion CR Kiwami 3-piece wheels (18x10.5 +15 front, 18x11.5 +25 rear) with Nitto NT01 tires (275/35/18 front, 315/30/18 rear). Rear wing is a custom 993 GT2-style carbon fiber unit with adjustable Gurney flaps, paired with a custom aluminum rear diffuser with integrated LED brake cooling ducts.
